name: uci_qsar_fish_toxicity
notes: Direct UCI archive for the existing six-descriptor fish LC50 dataset. It is cached from the link and deduplicated during training.

name: zenodo_acute_aquatic_toxicity_3680
notes: High-quality larger source with SMILES/SDF and fish pLC50 values. Disabled until a descriptor-generation step converts it to CIC0, SM1_Dz_Z, GATS1i, NdsCH, NdssC, MLOGP, LC50.
